Important Information

  • Completion of a programme does not constitute an employment offer or guarantee of employment by CRAVELLE sp. z o.o. or any partner organisation.
  • Certificates are issued by CRAVELLE sp. z o.o. and do not represent accredited academic qualifications. Recognition of certificates by third-party institutions is at their discretion.
  • Programme content and schedules may be updated without prior notice.
  • Pricing is not yet available — payment functionality is coming soon.
